prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为 1215→908→894→813→2999 名。2021–2024 年位次整体呈小幅前移趋势（从 1215 名升至 813 名），但 2025 年因专业组拆分为（01）和（02）两组，其中（02）组包含药学、公共事业管理等专业，最低位次骤降至 2999 名，而（01）组临床医学（八年制）位次仍为 1157 名，故 2025 年校最低位次 2999 名受专业组结构影响较大，不能完全代表该校整体录取水平；该校在北京市综合类招生计划：2021–2023 年均为 3 人，2024 年 2 人，2025 年增至 5 人；2026 年大幅扩招至 13 人，较 2025 年增加 8 人（增幅 160%），扩招幅度极大，将显著拉低录取位次。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 复旦大学上海医学院依托复旦大学（985、211、双一流），软科中国大学排名中复旦大学主校 2026 年位列第 5 名，属全国顶尖高校层次；医学院临床医学学科评估 A，公共卫生与预防医学 A+，药学 A，护理学 A-，综合实力位居全国医学院前列；2026 年高考周期内复旦大学声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及师德师风与学校管理类事件，但未出现直接影响招生热度的重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 4（高热），短视频平台曝光量极高，反映社会关注度持续旺盛；2025 年声誉偏正面（科研成果突出），整体报考心理偏向积极；临床医学（A）、公共卫生与预防医学（A+）、药学（A）、护理学（A-）、生物医学工程（A-）等均 为 A 类学科，其中临床医学（八年制）为该校最热门专业，学科实力与就业前景均属顶尖水平。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学专业 2024 年热度指数 70.19（推荐），口腔医学 72.31（推荐），医学类专业整体保持高热推荐状态；北京市 2026 年高考报名总人数约 84,900 人，较 2025 年 65,434 人增加约 29.7%，考生规模大幅增长，竞争进一步加剧；复旦大学上海医学院位于上海市，对北京市考生而言属于跨省报考；该校在北京市招生占比极小（2025 年仅 5 人），属典型的外省顶尖医学院在京少量招生，地域偏好对报考决策影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年专业组拆分导致的位次异常、2026 年招生计划大幅扩招 160%、北京市考生总数增长约 29.7% 以及医学类专业持续高热等多重因素：扩招对位次的后移作用远大于考生增加的前移压力，且 2025 年 2999 名本身已因专业组结构而偏高，故 2026 年预测位次将大幅后移至约 5728 名，区间 5228–6228 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（八年制临床医师班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 药学（含药学拔尖班、药学产教融合班）
- 预防医学（含预防医学拔尖班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 法医学（含法医学卓越班）
- 公共事业管理（含公共事业管理拔尖班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026 年该校大幅扩招至 13 人，位次预计后移至 5228–6228 名区间。位次在区间内建议以二档专业为主、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<5228 名）可重点冲刺一档临床医学（八年制）；位次接近区间上限（>6228 名）建议以三档专业保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the comprehensive category in Beijing were 1215→908→894→813→2999 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, the rankings showed a slight upward trend (from 1215 to 813), but in 2025, due to the split of major groups into (01) and (02), where group (02) includes majors such as Pharmacy and Public Administration, the minimum ranking dropped sharply to 2999, while group (01) Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program) remained at 1157. Therefore, the 2025 minimum ranking of 2999 was significantly affected by the structure of major groups and cannot fully represent the overall admission level of the university. The enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Beijing: 3 students each year from 2021 to 2023, 2 students in 2024, and increased to 5 students in 2025. In 2026, the enrollment will greatly expand to 13 students, an increase of 8 students (160% increase) compared to 2025, which will significantly lower the admission ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University Shanghai Medical College is affiliated with Fudan University (985, 211, Double First-Class). In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, Fudan University main campus ranked 5th, placing it among the top universities in the country. The medical college's Clinical Medicine discipline is rated A, Public Health and Preventive Medicine A+, Pharmacy A, Nursing A-, with comprehensive strength ranking among the top medical schools nationwide. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Fudan University's reputation evaluation was slightly negative, mainly involving incidents related to teacher ethics and school management, but no major negative public opinion directly affecting enrollment popularity occurred. Douyin popularity ranking 4th (high heat), with extremely high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting sustained social attention. In 2025, the reputation was slightly positive (outstanding scientific research achievements), and overall application psychology tends to be positive. Clinical Medicine (A), Public Health and Preventive Medicine (A+), Pharmacy (A), Nursing (A-), Biomedical Engineering (A-) are all A-level disciplines, among which Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program) is the most popular major at the university, with top-tier academic strength and employment prospects.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity index for Clinical Medicine was 70.19 (recommended), for Stomatology 72.31 (recommended), and medical majors overall maintained a high recommended status. The total number of Beijing college entrance examination registrants in 2026 is approximately 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% compared to 65,434 in 2025, with a significant increase in the number of candidates, further intensifying competition. Fudan University Shanghai Medical College is located in Shanghai, making it an inter-provincial application for Beijing candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Beijing is extremely small (only 5 students in 2025), typical of a top-tier medical school from another province recruiting a small number of students in Beijing, with regional preferences having limited impact on application decisions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the ranking anomaly caused by the 2025 major group split, the 160% expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan, the approximately 29.7% increase in the number of Beijing candidates, and the sustained high popularity of medical majors: the downward pressure on rankings from enrollment expansion far outweighs the upward pressure from the increase in candidates, and the 2025 ranking of 2999 itself was already inflated due to the major group structure. Therefore, the predicted ranking for 2026 will significantly drop to approximately 5728, with a range of 5228–6228.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Clinical Physician Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Pharmacy (including Pharmacy Top-Tier Class, Pharmacy Industry-Education Integration Class)
- Preventive Medicine (including Preventive Medicine Top-Tier Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Forensic Medicine (including Forensic Medicine Excellence Class)
- Public Administration (including Public Administration Top-Tier Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the university will significantly expand enrollment to 13 students, with the ranking expected to drop to the 5228–6228 range. Candidates with rankings within this range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<5228) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program). Candidates with rankings near the upper limit (>6228) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety.
